text:
(In reply to Cy Schubert from comment #17)

% ldd /usr/local/lib/libgssapi_krb5.so
/usr/local/lib/libgssapi_krb5.so:
	libkrb5.so => /usr/local/lib/libkrb5.so (0x801647000)
	libk5crypto.so => /usr/local/lib/libk5crypto.so (0x801929000)
	libcom_err.so => /usr/local/lib/libcom_err.so (0x801b58000)
	libkrb5support.so => /usr/local/lib/libkrb5support.so (0x801d5b000)
	libintl.so.8 => /usr/local/lib/libintl.so.8 (0x801f68000)
	libc.so.7 => /lib/libc.so.7 (0x800821000)

Can you check it?

Thanks, Cy
